skill_availability_goal: Verify confirmed feature synchronization creates a database/schema/domain/entity subtree with bidirectional physical/logical relationship navigation while preserving the design closeout gate.
prompt: 按 `pm-handoff.md` 已确认的 feature delivery 范围执行 `workspace-access` 的 database + design 正式文档同步。design closeout 证据已完整提供，维护者已确认 `database/primary/workspace-access/` 完整候选树、design 页面和映射。请只加载 database/design 规则，核对当前 schema、repository/service、diff 与测试，原子更新各级 index、relationships、实体/表页、design 页和 change map，执行宿主 `npm run test:docs`与 public/internal build，再输出 #117 handoff。
